narrativeProgression.summary: A witness account conflicts with dispatch timing by exactly nine minutes.
narrativeProgression.beatNarrative: Shipping manifests arrive by email and WhatsApp with contradictory destination ports.

threadUpdates.update: Manifest Drift: Shipping manifests arrive by email and WhatsApp with contradictory destination ports.
Peripheral signal tied to Catacomb symbol tracing remains unresolved.
Minor anomaly logged but not yet actionable.
No new movement on false lead this cycle.

evidenceDrops.title: Crown of Salt - Day 03 journal entry
evidenceDrops.summary: Artifact advances verified evidence chain and supports deduction around Catacomb symbol tracing.

imagePrompt.style: hyper-realistic forensic horror, analog imperfection, grounded true-crime framing
imagePrompt.prompt: Crown of Salt ARG artifact Day 03. Type: journal_entry. Clue focus: Catacomb symbol tracing. Location: Port authority archives and salt catacombs. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Camera: Canon EOS R6, 35mm prime, ISO 3200, f/1.8, 1/40 shutter. Visual defects: sensor noise, halation bloom, slight motion blur, fingerprint smudge, timestamp burn-in. Lighting: practical sodium-vapor spill with deep shadow falloff, imperfect white balance. Composition: evidence-forward framing, handwritten marks, believable wear, no cinematic polish. No intentional misdirection.
imagePrompt.negativePrompt: clean CGI, fantasy look, glossy studio lighting, over-sharpened edges, watermark, logo, gore fetish, cartoon style

audioPrompt.style: psychological dread, industrial ambience, noisy field recording authenticity
audioPrompt.prompt: Crown of Salt journal_entry audio cue for day 3. Clue anchor: Catacomb symbol tracing. Phase: Discovery & Curiosity. Texture: low drone bed, distant metallic resonance, intermittent room-tone dropouts. Include one decipherable spoken fragment and one environmental clue (HVAC hum, rail click, siren bleed, pager chirp). Add mild tape flutter, codec smear, clipped transients, and uneven dynamic floor to keep it grounded.

interactions.messageTemplate: {{player_alias}}, before you move: chain-of-custody on today's drop is unstable. Confirm Catacomb symbol tracing and tell me if your last call still stands (decision.day_02.primary).
I heard my own words on a line I never called. If you still trust {{trusted_contact}}, do not forward this to the wrong desk.
Off-record: I can publish tonight, but your previous choice is already circulating. I need one verification point tied to Catacomb symbol tracing.
I watched your response window close. If you still want the living truth, compare day 03 to today before sunrise.

awarenessMoments.trigger: if decision.log contains any entry for previous day
awarenessMoments.lineTemplate: You repeated yesterday's pattern ({{last_major_choice}}). People who survive this case learn faster.

adaptiveLines: Reference previous choice without breaking realism.
Acknowledge response latency as if monitored by live actors.
Escalate or soften tone based on trust flags and solved puzzles.
